samplePrompts.text: Summarize the problem statement and design scope in engineering_design_review_001.pptx.
What system components or layers are shown in solution_architecture_update_002.pptx?
What interfaces or data flows are called out between components in the architecture update deck?
What risks or open issues are highlighted in engineering_design_review_001.pptx?
Compare the two engineering decks: what stayed the same and what changed?
